artifacts.title: Ready for review memo
artifacts.purpose: Plain-language local readiness and review start page.

artifacts.title: Judge review packet
artifacts.purpose: Single review packet that separates local readiness from external approval gates.

artifacts.title: README
artifacts.purpose: Portable project overview and local run instructions.

artifacts.title: Control Tower dashboard
artifacts.purpose: Main local dashboard showing incidents, approval queue, and MCP Remediation Ledger.

artifacts.title: Demo tour
artifacts.purpose: Recording-friendly walkthrough for the public demo video.

artifacts.title: Submission gate ledger
artifacts.purpose: Single ledger for public repo, video, optional Splunk/MCP proof, and Devpost gates.

artifacts.title: Submission deadline burndown
artifacts.purpose: Deadline-aware sequence for public repo, video, optional live proof, URL writeback, and Devpost final submit.

artifacts.title: Splunk-ready CSV
artifacts.purpose: Synthetic checkout-incident events ready for an agentops_events index after approval.

artifacts.title: SPL query pack
artifacts.purpose: Queries for high-risk events, approval queue, MCP remediation ledger, and external guardrails.

artifacts.title: Local SPL-equivalent proof
artifacts.purpose: Local proof that the query intent returns concrete rows before live Splunk setup.

artifacts.title: Splunk index config
artifacts.purpose: Optional app-local index definition for agentops_events.

artifacts.title: Splunk sourcetype config
artifacts.purpose: CSV extraction and timestamp parsing for agentops:events.

artifacts.title: Splunk app package manifest
artifacts.purpose: Local .spl package members, SHA256, and no-install/no-upload boundary.

artifacts.title: Splunk app package
artifacts.purpose: Local reviewable .spl artifact. It is not installed or uploaded.

artifacts.title: Splunk MCP command plan
artifacts.purpose: Post-approval plan for account/license, synthetic import, app install, MCP setup, and proof capture.

artifacts.title: Splunk MCP proof brief
artifacts.purpose: Decision brief for live proof success criteria, screen safety, stop conditions, and claim upgrade rules.

artifacts.title: Splunk MCP prompt pack
artifacts.purpose: Five approved-proof prompts with SPL, expected citations, success readbacks, and stop conditions.

artifacts.title: Splunk MCP prompt pack submission copy
artifacts.purpose: Markdown copy of the Splunk MCP prompt pack for public review and live proof preparation.

artifacts.title: Splunk MCP proof capture manifest
artifacts.purpose: Capture slots, expected readback, stop conditions, and claim-upgrade gate for optional live proof.

artifacts.title: Splunk MCP proof capture manifest submission copy
artifacts.purpose: Markdown copy of the optional live proof capture manifest.

artifacts.title: Devpost submission packet
artifacts.purpose: Local Devpost field packet with pending URL placeholders and claim boundaries.

artifacts.title: Devpost final copy
artifacts.purpose: Copy/paste text and character checks for the final Devpost form.

artifacts.title: Devpost submit command plan
artifacts.purpose: Post-approval Devpost form-fill, final review, submit, and readback plan.

artifacts.title: Devpost manual fill brief
artifacts.purpose: Field-by-field form fill order, readback checks, and stop conditions before final submit.

artifacts.title: Devpost final review checklist
artifacts.purpose: Unchecked final-screen checklist for track, public URLs, claim boundaries, human confirmations, video safety, validation, and explicit final approval.

artifacts.title: External approval packet
artifacts.purpose: Purpose, operation, benefit, risk, and verification for each external action.

artifacts.title: Next approval packet
artifacts.purpose: Shows the next approval target, copy-paste approval phrases, and human confirmations before Devpost.

artifacts.title: Publication command plan
artifacts.purpose: Post-approval public GitHub command plan using isolated TEMP staging. It does not create or push a repo.

artifacts.title: Public repo metadata
artifacts.purpose: GitHub repository name, description, topics, expected readback, and no-publish boundary.

artifacts.title: Video command plan
artifacts.purpose: Post-approval recording/upload plan. It does not record or upload.

artifacts.title: Video recording preview
artifacts.purpose: Local-only localhost preview preflight for the public demo recording path.

artifacts.title: Video upload metadata
artifacts.purpose: Public demo video title, description, tags, visibility, expected readback, and no-upload boundary.

artifacts.title: Public artifact URL readback
artifacts.purpose: Post-publication URL readback gate before approved URL writeback.

artifacts.title: Submission URL apply plan
artifacts.purpose: Dry-run or approved local URL write plan. It does not write without explicit approval.

artifacts.title: Post-action evidence brief
artifacts.purpose: Readback checklist for proving public repo, video, URL writeback, optional Splunk/MCP proof, and Devpost submit after approval.

artifacts.title: Post-action evidence log template
artifacts.purpose: Template to copy/fill after approved external actions are completed.

artifacts.title: Final Go/No-Go
artifacts.purpose: Separates local readiness from pending external gates.

artifacts.title: Local readiness baseline
artifacts.purpose: Targeted local baseline that explains stale/full validator failures without moving external gates.

artifacts.title: Public candidate local audit
artifacts.purpose: Scans the local public candidate for required artifacts, internal paths, secret-like strings, and claim boundaries.

artifacts.title: Devpost copy audit
artifacts.purpose: Checks final Devpost copy, placeholders, character limits, field-map alignment, and overclaim boundaries.

artifacts.title: Claim evidence matrix
artifacts.purpose: Maps public claims to evidence, allowed wording, avoid wording, and remaining gates.

artifacts.title: Claim boundary validation
artifacts.purpose: Checks that live Splunk/MCP claims are not overstated before proof exists.

artifacts.title: Submission URL validation
artifacts.purpose: Shows repository/video URLs are still pending or approved-public.

artifacts.title: Content rights audit
artifacts.purpose: Shows license, bundled asset, audio/video, trademark, and screen-safety evidence.

artifacts.title: Eligibility and compliance audit
artifacts.purpose: Separates automated compliance evidence from user-confirmed eligibility, team, ownership, and conflict items.

artifacts.title: Approval consistency audit
artifacts.purpose: Checks that approval order stays public repo, public video, optional Splunk/MCP proof, URL writeback, then Devpost.

artifacts.title: Status conflict audit
artifacts.purpose: Scans JSON reports for stale failed statuses, failed counts, and missing local artifacts.

artifacts.title: Public launch snapshot
artifacts.purpose: Freezes the public repo/video approval evidence, ZIP hash, approval phrases, and no-external-action boundary.

artifacts.title: Release integrity manifest
artifacts.purpose: Summarizes key artifact SHA256, size, ZIP count consistency, and no-publish boundary.

artifacts.title: Official source freshness
artifacts.purpose: Shows the latest official Devpost source check and local requirement mapping.

artifacts.title: Public candidate manifest
artifacts.purpose: Shows this folder is a clean local public-candidate staging area.

artifacts.title: Official requirements audit
artifacts.purpose: Maps current artifacts to the official Devpost requirements.

artifacts.title: Judge review packet markdown
artifacts.purpose: Markdown copy of the review packet for local and public-candidate review.

artifacts.title: Judging alignment
artifacts.purpose: Maps the project to judging criteria and bonus alignment.

artifacts.title: Judge scorecard
artifacts.purpose: Maps Stage One, Stage Two, and bonus judging points to concrete evidence and remaining gates.

artifacts.title: Launch runbook
artifacts.purpose: Preflight, launch sequence, claim wording, and final safety gate.

artifacts.title: Review Q&A
artifacts.purpose: Judge-facing answers and safe copy guardrails.

recommended_review_order: Review reports/latest_local_readiness_baseline.html to separate local readiness from external gates.
Open reports/latest_judge_quickstart.html for the 5-minute review path.
Review reports/latest_submission_deadline_burndown.html for target submit timing and milestone order.
Open reports/latest_next_approval_packet.html to decide the next explicit approval phrase.
Open reports/latest_public_launch_snapshot.html to confirm the exact repo/video launch packet before approval.
Open reports/latest_approval_consistency_audit.html to confirm stale Splunk-first guidance is not present.
Open reports/latest_status_conflict_audit.html to confirm no stale failed status remains in JSON reports.
Review reports/latest_control_tower.html and reports/latest_demo_tour.html for the story.
Review Splunk evidence: local SPL proof, .spl package manifest, Splunk MCP command plan, proof brief, and prompt pack.
Review Devpost final copy and URL validation.
Only after explicit approval, proceed to public repo, video, optional live Splunk/MCP proof, and final Devpost submit gates.
boundary: This review index is local evidence only. It does not publish a repository, record or upload video, connect to Splunk, write approved URLs, update Devpost, or submit anything.
